race.description: Jcf Contracting Super Showcase Maiden Handicap
race.comment: A good contest. ODIN'S EYE (3) made an encouraging debut, finishing 2.5 lengths back over 1200m at Newcastle. Sure to improve and has a low barrier and the blinkers on for the first time. Keeps Schiller and has decent claims. LONG LIVE (2) led on debut and just missed over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Tackles a longer journey this time, but she's in a top stable and expected to manage. BAQUEIRA (8) was only beaten 1.75 lengths on debut over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Has a sticky gate, but the longer sprint will suit. PRINCE TOMMY (4) is a first-starter for the Matthew Smith stable. Fitter for recent trials so keep safe.
